title: Taylor Swift Announces Retirement from Touring After Eras Tour
subtitle: Music industry grapples with seismic shift as world's biggest touring act exits stage

ripples.headline: Ticketmaster stock plummets 23% as investors flee live entertainment sector
Live Nation cancels venue expansion projects worth $2.8 billion globally
Concert merchandise suppliers face mass layoffs as demand evaporates
Hotel chains near major venues report 40% booking cancellation spike
Airlines reduce flight frequency to secondary markets hit by venue closures
Uber surge pricing algorithms recalibrate after concert demand patterns collapse
Local burrito truck raises prices 15% after losing concert venue customers

symphony_arc.opening: A single announcement reverberates through financial markets as Ticketmaster's empire trembles
symphony_arc.development: Cascading failures ripple through interconnected entertainment infrastructure and hospitality networks
symphony_arc.climax: Economic restructuring forces mass layoffs across multiple industries dependent on live events
symphony_arc.resolution: The butterfly effect reaches its inevitable conclusion in slightly more expensive lunch

choices: Buy that burrito before inflation hits
